tip: Print help text and exit.
option.name: -h

tip: Print program version and exit.
option.name: --version

tip: Update this program to the latest nightly version.
option.name: -U

tip: Do not check for updates (default).
option.name: --no-update

tip: U: --update-to [CHANNEL]@[TAG]
Upgrade/downgrade to a specific version.
option.name: --update-to

tip: Ignore download and postprocessing errors.
option.name: -i

tip: Continue with next video on download errors (default).
option.name: --no-abort-on-error

tip: Abort downloading of further videos if an error occurs.
option.name: --abort-on-error

tip: List all supported extractors and exit.
option.name: --list-extractors

tip: Output descriptions of all supported extractors and exit.
option.name: --extractor-descriptions

tip: U: --use-extractors NAMES
Extractor names to use separated by commas.
option.name: --use-extractors

tip: U: --default-search PREFIX
Use this prefix for unqualified URLs.
option.name: --default-search

tip: Don't load any more configuration files.
option.name: --ignore-config

tip: Do not load any custom configuration files (default).
option.name: --no-config-locations

tip: U: --config-locations PATH
Location of the main configuration file.
option.name: --config-locations

tip: U: --plugin-dirs DIR
Path to an additional directory to search for plugins.
option.name: --plugin-dirs

tip: Clear plugin directories to search, including defaults.
option.name: --no-plugin-dirs

tip: U: --js-runtimes RUNTIME[:PATH]
Additional JavaScript runtime to enable.
option.name: --js-runtimes

tip: Clear JavaScript runtimes to enable, including defaults.
option.name: --no-js-runtimes

tip: U: --remote-components COMPONENT
Remote components to allow yt-dlp to fetch.
option.name: --remote-components

tip: Disallow fetching of all remote components.
option.name: --no-remote-components

tip: Do not extract a playlist's URL result entries.
option.name: --flat-playlist

tip: Fully extract the videos of a playlist (default).
option.name: --no-flat-playlist

tip: Download livestreams from the start.
option.name: --live-from-start

tip: Download livestreams from the current time (default).
option.name: --no-live-from-start

tip: U: --wait-for-video MIN[-MAX]
Wait for scheduled streams to become available.
option.name: --wait-for-video

tip: Do not wait for scheduled streams (default).
option.name: --no-wait-for-video

tip: Mark videos watched (even with --simulate).
option.name: --mark-watched

tip: Do not mark videos watched (default).
option.name: --no-mark-watched

tip: U: --color [STREAM:]POLICY
Whether to emit color codes in output.
option.name: --color

tip: U: --compat-options OPTS
Options that can help keep compatibility with youtube-dl.
option.name: --compat-options

tip: U: --alias ALIASES OPTIONS
Create aliases for an option string.
option.name: --alias

tip: U: -t, --preset-alias PRESET
Applies a predefined set of options.
option.name: -t

tip: U: --proxy URL
Use the specified HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS proxy.
option.name: --proxy

tip: U: --socket-timeout SECONDS
Time to wait before giving up, in seconds.
option.name: --socket-timeout

tip: U: --source-address IP
Client-side IP address to bind to.
option.name: --source-address

tip: U: --impersonate CLIENT[:OS]
Client to impersonate for requests.
option.name: --impersonate

tip: List available clients to impersonate.
option.name: --list-impersonate-targets

tip: Make all connections via IPv4.
Make all connections via IPv6.
Enable file:// URLs (disabled by default for security).
option.name: --enable-file-urls

tip: U: --geo-verification-proxy URL
Use this proxy to verify the IP address for some geo-restricted sites.
option.name: --geo-verification-proxy

tip: U: --xff VALUE
How to fake X-Forwarded-For HTTP header to try bypassing geographic restriction.
option.name: --xff

tip: U: -I, --playlist-items ITEM_SPEC
Comma-separated playlist_index of the items to download.
option.name: -I

tip: U: --min-filesize SIZE
Abort download if filesize is smaller than SIZE.
option.name: --min-filesize

tip: U: --max-filesize SIZE
Abort download if filesize is larger than SIZE.
option.name: --max-filesize

tip: U: --date DATE
Download only videos uploaded on this date.
option.name: --date

tip: U: --datebefore DATE
Download only videos uploaded on or before this date.
option.name: --datebefore

tip: U: --dateafter DATE
Download only videos uploaded on or after this date.
option.name: --dateafter

tip: U: --match-filters FILTER
Generic video filter.
option.name: --match-filters

tip: Do not use any --match-filters (default).
option.name: --no-match-filters

tip: U: --break-match-filters FILTER
Same as --match-filters but stops the download process when a video is rejected.
option.name: --break-match-filters

tip: Do not use any --break-match-filters (default).
option.name: --no-break-match-filters

tip: Download only the video, if the URL refers to a video and a playlist.
option.name: --no-playlist

tip: Download the playlist, if the URL refers to a video and a playlist.
option.name: --yes-playlist

tip: U: --age-limit YEARS
Download only videos suitable for the given age.
option.name: --age-limit

tip: U: --download-archive FILE
Download only videos not listed in the archive file.
option.name: --download-archive

tip: Do not use archive file (default).
option.name: --no-download-archive

tip: U: --max-downloads NUMBER
Abort after downloading NUMBER files.
option.name: --max-downloads

tip: Stop the download process when encountering a file that is in the archive.
option.name: --break-on-existing

tip: Do not stop the download process when encountering a file that is in the archive (default).
option.name: --no-break-on-existing

tip: Alters --max-downloads, --break-on-existing, --break-match-filters, and autonumber to reset per input URL.
option.name: --break-per-input

tip: --break-on-existing and similar options terminates the entire download queue.
option.name: --no-break-per-input

tip: U: --skip-playlist-after-errors N
Number of allowed failures until the rest of the playlist is skipped.
option.name: --skip-playlist-after-errors

tip: U: -N, --concurrent-fragments N
Number of fragments of a dash/hlsnative video that should be downloaded concurrently.
option.name: -N

tip: U: -r, --limit-rate RATE
Maximum download rate in bytes per second.
option.name: -r

tip: U: --throttled-rate RATE
Minimum download rate in bytes per second below which throttling is assumed.
option.name: --throttled-rate

tip: U: -R, --retries RETRIES
Number of retries (default is 10), or 'infinite'.
option.name: -R

tip: U: --file-access-retries RETRIES
Number of times to retry on file access error (default is 3), or 'infinite'.
option.name: --file-access-retries

tip: U: --fragment-retries RETRIES
Number of retries for a fragment (default is 10), or 'infinite'.
option.name: --fragment-retries

tip: U: --retry-sleep [TYPE:]EXPR
Time to sleep between retries in seconds.
option.name: --retry-sleep

tip: Skip unavailable fragments for DASH, hlsnative and ISM downloads (default).
option.name: --skip-unavailable-fragments

tip: Abort download if a fragment is unavailable.
option.name: --abort-on-unavailable-fragments

tip: Keep downloaded fragments on disk after downloading is finished.
option.name: --keep-fragments

tip: Delete downloaded fragments after downloading is finished (default).
option.name: --no-keep-fragments

tip: U: --buffer-size SIZE
Size of download buffer, e.g. 1024 or 16K (default is 1024).
option.name: --buffer-size

tip: The buffer size is automatically resized from an initial value of --buffer-size (default).
option.name: --resize-buffer

tip: Do not automatically adjust the buffer size.
option.name: --no-resize-buffer

tip: U: --http-chunk-size SIZE
Size of a chunk for chunk-based HTTP downloading, e.g. 10485760 or 10M (default is disabled).
option.name: --http-chunk-size

tip: Download playlist videos in random order.
option.name: --playlist-random

tip: Process entries in the playlist as they are received.
option.name: --lazy-playlist

tip: Process videos in the playlist only after the entire playlist is parsed (default).
option.name: --no-lazy-playlist

tip: Use the mpegts container for HLS videos; allowing some players to play the video while downloading.
option.name: --hls-use-mpegts

tip: Do not use the mpegts container for HLS videos (default when not downloading live streams).
option.name: --no-hls-use-mpegts

tip: U: --download-sections REGEX
Download only chapters that match the regular expression.
option.name: --download-sections

tip: U: --downloader [PROTO:]NAME
Name or path of the external downloader to use.
option.name: --downloader

tip: U: --downloader-args NAME:ARGS
Give these arguments to the external downloader.
option.name: --downloader-args

tip: U: -a, --batch-file FILE
File containing URLs to download ('-' for stdin), one URL per line.
option.name: -a

tip: Do not read URLs from batch file (default).
option.name: --no-batch-file

tip: U: -P, --paths [TYPES:]PATH
The paths where the files should be downloaded.
option.name: -P

tip: U: -o, --output [TYPES:]TEMPLATE
Output filename template; see OUTPUT TEMPLATE for details.
option.name: -o

tip: U: --output-na-placeholder TEXT
Placeholder for unavailable fields in --output (default: 'NA').
option.name: --output-na-placeholder

tip: Restrict filenames to only ASCII characters, and avoid '&' and spaces in filenames.
option.name: --restrict-filenames

tip: Allow Unicode characters, '&' and spaces in filenames (default).
option.name: --no-restrict-filenames

tip: Force filenames to be Windows-compatible.
option.name: --windows-filenames

tip: Sanitize filenames only minimally.
option.name: --no-windows-filenames

tip: U: --trim-filenames LENGTH
Limit the filename length (excluding extension) to the specified number of characters.
option.name: --trim-filenames

tip: Do not overwrite any files.
option.name: -w

tip: Overwrite all video and metadata files.
option.name: --force-overwrites

tip: Do not overwrite the video, but overwrite related files (default).
option.name: --no-force-overwrites

tip: Resume partially downloaded files/fragments (default).
option.name: -c

tip: Do not resume partially downloaded fragments.
option.name: --no-continue

tip: Use .part files instead of writing directly into output file (default).
option.name: --part

tip: Do not use .part files - write directly into output file.
option.name: --no-part

tip: Use the Last-modified header to set the file modification time.
option.name: --mtime

tip: Do not use the Last-modified header to set the file modification time (default).
option.name: --no-mtime

tip: Write video description to a .description file.
option.name: --write-description

tip: Do not write video description (default).
option.name: --no-write-description

tip: Write video metadata to a .info.json file (this may contain personal information).
option.name: --write-info-json

tip: Do not write video metadata (default).
option.name: --no-write-info-json

tip: Write playlist metadata in addition to the video metadata when using --write-info-json, --write-description etc. (default).
option.name: --write-playlist-metafiles

tip: Do not write playlist metadata when using --write-info-json, --write-description etc.
option.name: --no-write-playlist-metafiles

tip: Remove some internal metadata such as filenames from the infojson (default).
option.name: --clean-info-json

tip: Write all fields to the infojson.
option.name: --no-clean-info-json

tip: Retrieve video comments to be placed in the infojson.
option.name: --write-comments

tip: Do not retrieve video comments unless the extraction is known to be quick.
option.name: --no-write-comments

tip: U: --load-info-json FILE
JSON file containing the video information (created with the --write-info-json option).
option.name: --load-info-json

tip: U: --cookies FILE
Netscape formatted file to read cookies from and dump cookie jar in.
option.name: --cookies

tip: Do not read/dump cookies from/to file (default).
option.name: --no-cookies

tip: U: --cookies-from-browser BROWSER[+KEYRING][:PROFILE][::CONTAINER]
The name of the browser to load cookies from.
option.name: --cookies-from-browser

tip: Do not load cookies from browser (default).
option.name: --no-cookies-from-browser

tip: U: --cache-dir DIR
Location in the filesystem where yt-dlp can store some downloaded information.
option.name: --cache-dir

tip: Disable filesystem caching.
option.name: --no-cache-dir

tip: Delete all filesystem cache files.
option.name: --rm-cache-dir

tip: Write thumbnail image to disk.
option.name: --write-thumbnail

tip: Do not write thumbnail image to disk (default).
option.name: --no-write-thumbnail

tip: Write all thumbnail image formats to disk.
option.name: --write-all-thumbnails

tip: List available thumbnails of each video.
option.name: --list-thumbnails

tip: Write an internet shortcut file, depending on the current platform.
option.name: --write-link

tip: Write a .url Windows internet shortcut.
option.name: --write-url-link

tip: Write a .webloc macOS internet shortcut.
option.name: --write-webloc-link

tip: Write a .desktop Linux internet shortcut.
option.name: --write-desktop-link

tip: Activate quiet mode.
option.name: -q

tip: Deactivate quiet mode (Default).
option.name: --no-quiet

tip: Ignore warnings.
option.name: --no-warnings

tip: Do not download the video and do not write anything to disk.
option.name: -s

tip: Download the video even if printing/listing options are used.
option.name: --no-simulate

tip: Ignore 'No video formats' error.
option.name: --ignore-no-formats-error

tip: Throw error when no downloadable video formats are found (default).
option.name: --no-ignore-no-formats-error

tip: Do not download the video but write all related files.
option.name: --skip-download

tip: U: -O, --print [WHEN:]TEMPLATE
Field name or output template to print to screen.
option.name: -O

tip: U: --print-to-file [WHEN:]TEMPLATE FILE
Append given template to the file.
option.name: --print-to-file

tip: Quiet, but print JSON information for each video.
option.name: -j

tip: Quiet, but print JSON information for each URL or infojson passed.
option.name: -J

tip: Force download archive entries to be written as far as no errors occur.
option.name: --force-write-archive

tip: Output progress bar as new lines.
option.name: --newline

tip: Do not print progress bar.
option.name: --no-progress

tip: Show progress bar, even if in quiet mode.
option.name: --progress

tip: Display progress in console titlebar.
option.name: --console-title

tip: U: --progress-template [TYPES:]TEMPLATE
Template for progress outputs.
option.name: --progress-template

tip: U: --progress-delta SECONDS
Time between progress output (default: 0).
option.name: --progress-delta

tip: Print various debugging information.
option.name: -v

tip: Print downloaded pages encoded using base64 to debug problems (very verbose).
option.name: --dump-pages

tip: Write downloaded intermediary pages to files in the current directory to debug problems.
option.name: --write-pages

tip: Display sent and read HTTP traffic.
option.name: --print-traffic

tip: U: --encoding ENCODING
Force the specified encoding (experimental).
option.name: --encoding

tip: Explicitly allow HTTPS connection to servers that do not support RFC 5746 secure renegotiation.
option.name: --legacy-server-connect

tip: Suppress HTTPS certificate validation.
option.name: --no-check-certificates

tip: Use an unencrypted connection to retrieve information about the video.
option.name: --prefer-insecure

tip: U: --add-headers FIELD:VALUE
Specify a custom HTTP header and its value, separated by a colon ':'.
option.name: --add-headers

tip: Work around terminals that lack bidirectional text support.
option.name: --bidi-workaround

tip: U: --sleep-requests SECONDS
Number of seconds to sleep between requests during data extraction.
option.name: --sleep-requests

tip: U: --sleep-interval SECONDS
Number of seconds to sleep before each download.
option.name: --sleep-interval

tip: U: --max-sleep-interval SECONDS
Maximum number of seconds to sleep.
option.name: --max-sleep-interval

tip: U: --sleep-subtitles SECONDS
Number of seconds to sleep before each subtitle download.
option.name: --sleep-subtitles

tip: U: -f, --format FORMAT
Video format code, see FORMAT SELECTION for more details.
option.name: -f

tip: U: -S, --format-sort SORTORDER
Sort the formats by the fields given.
option.name: -S

tip: Disregard previous user specified sort order and reset to the default.
option.name: --format-sort-reset

tip: Force user specified sort order to have precedence over all fields.
option.name: --format-sort-force

tip: Some fields have precedence over the user specified sort order (default).
option.name: --no-format-sort-force

tip: Allow multiple video streams to be merged into a single file.
option.name: --video-multistreams

tip: Only one video stream is downloaded for each output file (default).
option.name: --no-video-multistreams

tip: Allow multiple audio streams to be merged into a single file.
option.name: --audio-multistreams

tip: Only one audio stream is downloaded for each output file (default).
option.name: --no-audio-multistreams

tip: Prefer video formats with free containers over non-free ones of the same quality.
option.name: --prefer-free-formats

tip: Don't give any special preference to free containers (default).
option.name: --no-prefer-free-formats

tip: Make sure formats are selected only from those that are actually downloadable.
option.name: --check-formats

tip: Check all formats for whether they are actually downloadable.
option.name: --check-all-formats

tip: Do not check that the formats are actually downloadable.
option.name: --no-check-formats

tip: List available formats of each video.
option.name: -F

tip: U: --merge-output-format FORMAT
Containers that may be used when merging formats, separated by '/'.
option.name: --merge-output-format

tip: Write subtitle file.
option.name: --write-subs

tip: Do not write subtitle file (default).
option.name: --no-write-subs

tip: Write automatically generated subtitle file.
option.name: --write-auto-subs

tip: Do not write auto-generated subtitles (default).
option.name: --no-write-auto-subs

tip: List available subtitles of each video.
option.name: --list-subs

tip: U: --sub-format FORMAT
Subtitle format; accepts formats preference separated by '/'.
option.name: --sub-format

tip: U: --sub-langs LANGS
Languages of the subtitles to download (can be regex) or 'all' separated by commas.
option.name: --sub-langs

tip: U: -u, --username USERNAME
Login with this account ID.
option.name: -u

tip: U: -p, --password PASSWORD
Account password.
option.name: -p

tip: U: -2, --twofactor TWOFACTOR
Two-factor authentication code.
Use .netrc authentication data.
option.name: -n

tip: U: --netrc-location PATH
Location of .netrc authentication data.
option.name: --netrc-location

tip: U: --netrc-cmd NETRC_CMD
Command to execute to get the credentials for an extractor.
option.name: --netrc-cmd

tip: U: --video-password PASSWORD
Video-specific password.
option.name: --video-password

tip: U: --ap-mso MSO
Adobe Pass multiple-system operator (TV provider) identifier.
option.name: --ap-mso

tip: U: --ap-username USERNAME
Multiple-system operator account login.
option.name: --ap-username

tip: U: --ap-password PASSWORD
Multiple-system operator account password.
option.name: --ap-password

tip: List all supported multiple-system operators.
option.name: --ap-list-mso

tip: U: --client-certificate CERTFILE
Path to client certificate file in PEM format.
option.name: --client-certificate

tip: U: --client-certificate-key KEYFILE
Path to private key file for client certificate.
option.name: --client-certificate-key

tip: U: --client-certificate-password PASSWORD
Password for client certificate private key, if encrypted.
option.name: --client-certificate-password

tip: Convert video files to audio-only files (requires ffmpeg and ffprobe).
option.name: -x

tip: U: --audio-format FORMAT
Format to convert the audio to when -x is used.
option.name: --audio-format

tip: U: --audio-quality QUALITY
Specify ffmpeg audio quality to use when converting the audio with -x.
option.name: --audio-quality

tip: U: --remux-video FORMAT
Remux the video into another container if necessary.
option.name: --remux-video

tip: U: --recode-video FORMAT
Re-encode the video into another format if necessary.
option.name: --recode-video

tip: U: --postprocessor-args NAME:ARGS
Give these arguments to the postprocessors.
option.name: --postprocessor-args

tip: Keep the intermediate video file on disk after post-processing.
option.name: -k

tip: Delete the intermediate video file after post-processing (default).
option.name: --no-keep-video

tip: Overwrite post-processed files (default).
option.name: --post-overwrites

tip: Do not overwrite post-processed files.
option.name: --no-post-overwrites

tip: Embed subtitles in the video (only for mp4, webm and mkv videos).
option.name: --embed-subs

tip: Do not embed subtitles (default).
option.name: --no-embed-subs

tip: Embed thumbnail in the video as cover art.
option.name: --embed-thumbnail

tip: Do not embed thumbnail (default).
option.name: --no-embed-thumbnail

tip: Embed metadata to the video file.
option.name: --embed-metadata

tip: Do not add metadata to file (default).
option.name: --no-embed-metadata

tip: Add chapter markers to the video file.
option.name: --embed-chapters

tip: Do not add chapter markers (default).
option.name: --no-embed-chapters

tip: Embed the infojson as an attachment to mkv/mka video files.
option.name: --embed-info-json

tip: Do not embed the infojson as an attachment to the video file.
option.name: --no-embed-info-json

tip: U: --parse-metadata [WHEN:]FROM:TO
Parse additional metadata like title/artist from other fields.
option.name: --parse-metadata

tip: U: --replace-in-metadata [WHEN:]FIELDS REGEX REPLACE
Replace text in a metadata field using the given regex.
option.name: --replace-in-metadata

tip: Write metadata to the video file's xattrs (using Dublin Core and XDG standards).
option.name: --xattrs

tip: U: --concat-playlist POLICY
Concatenate videos in a playlist.
option.name: --concat-playlist

tip: U: --fixup POLICY
Automatically correct known faults of the file.
option.name: --fixup

tip: U: --ffmpeg-location PATH
Location of the ffmpeg binary; either the path to the binary or its containing directory.
option.name: --ffmpeg-location

tip: U: --exec [WHEN:]CMD
Execute a command, optionally prefixed with when to execute it, separated by a ':'.
option.name: --exec

tip: Remove any previously defined --exec.
option.name: --no-exec

tip: U: --convert-subs FORMAT
Convert the subtitles to another format.
option.name: --convert-subs

tip: U: --convert-thumbnails FORMAT
Convert the thumbnails to another format.
option.name: --convert-thumbnails

tip: Split video into multiple files based on internal chapters.
option.name: --split-chapters

tip: Do not split video based on chapters (default).
option.name: --no-split-chapters

tip: U: --remove-chapters REGEX
Remove chapters whose title matches the given regular expression.
option.name: --remove-chapters

tip: Do not remove any chapters from the file (default).
option.name: --no-remove-chapters

tip: Force keyframes at cuts when downloading/splitting/removing sections.
option.name: --force-keyframes-at-cuts

tip: Do not force keyframes around the chapters when cutting/splitting (default).
option.name: --no-force-keyframes-at-cuts

tip: U: --use-postprocessor NAME[:ARGS]
The (case-sensitive) name of plugin postprocessors to be enabled.
option.name: --use-postprocessor

tip: U: --sponsorblock-mark CATS
SponsorBlock categories to create chapters for, separated by commas.
option.name: --sponsorblock-mark

tip: U: --sponsorblock-remove CATS
SponsorBlock categories to be removed from the video file, separated by commas.
option.name: --sponsorblock-remove

tip: U: --sponsorblock-chapter-title TEMPLATE
An output template for the title of the SponsorBlock chapters.
option.name: --sponsorblock-chapter-title

tip: Disable both --sponsorblock-mark and --sponsorblock-remove.
option.name: --no-sponsorblock

tip: U: --sponsorblock-api URL
SponsorBlock API location.
option.name: --sponsorblock-api

tip: U: --extractor-retries RETRIES
Number of retries for known extractor errors (default is 3), or 'infinite'.
option.name: --extractor-retries

tip: Process dynamic DASH manifests (default).
option.name: --allow-dynamic-mpd

tip: Do not process dynamic DASH manifests.
option.name: --ignore-dynamic-mpd

tip: Split HLS playlists to different formats at discontinuities such as ad breaks.
option.name: --hls-split-discontinuity

tip: Do not split HLS playlists into different formats at discontinuities such as ad breaks (default).
option.name: --no-hls-split-discontinuity

tip: U: --extractor-args IE_KEY:ARGS
Pass ARGS arguments to the IE_KEY extractor.
option.name: --extractor-args

description: yt-dlp - A feature-rich command-line audio/video downloader.

tip: Print help text and exit.
common_option.name: --help
